description:
## Post-Audit Follow-Up: hx-breadcrumb

Issues identified during Deep Audit v2 of `hx-breadcrumb` that were not fixed inline.

### Items
- [ ] The `current` attribute is additive — existing behavior (last item = current page) still works when no `current` is set, but should be documented
- [ ] The ellipsis expand sets `maxItems = 0` permanently on click, meaning re-collapse requires a page refresh — consider adding toggle behavior

### Context
- Audit feature: `feature-1772817611248-6zvrfppiu`
title: Post-Audit: hx-breadcrumb — follow-up items

descriptionHistory.description:
## Post-Audit Follow-Up: hx-breadcrumb

Issues identified during Deep Audit v2 of `hx-breadcrumb` that were not fixed inline.

### Items
- [ ] The `current` attribute is additive — existing behavior (last item = current page) still works when no `current` is set, but should be documented
- [ ] The ellipsis expand sets `maxItems = 0` permanently on click, meaning re-collapse requires a page refresh — consider adding toggle behavior

### Context
- Audit feature: `feature-1772817611248-6zvrfppiu`
